Weather service functionality, data management, event handling, forecast creation, and weather type definitions.


## Files
- **[weather_service.c](weather_service.c.md)**: Implements weather service functionality, including data management, event handling, and forecast creation.
- **[weather_service.h](weather_service.h.md)**: Manages weather forecast data on a watch, including initialization, retrieval, and list management functions.
- **[weather_service_private.h](weather_service_private.h.md)**: Defines a structure for serialized weather app preferences, including location data.
- **[weather_type_tuples.def](weather_type_tuples.def.md)**: Defines weather type tuples with attributes like ID, color, and timeline resource ID.
- **[weather_types.c](weather_types.c.md)**: Defines weather type properties including names, colors, and timeline resource IDs for Pebble firmware.
- **[weather_types.h](weather_types.h.md)**: Defines weather types and functions to get their names, background colors, text colors, and timeline resource IDs.
